_comment: EXAMPLE PACK entity-resolution config. Declares WHICH columns hold entity names and their types; resolve_entities.py auto-merges only exact normalized matches under strict guards, and parks anything fuzzy in a review table (entity_merge_candidates) — false merges invent connections, so nothing fuzzy merges without review.
_comment_min_norm_len: names whose normalized form is shorter than this stay singletons — short strings collide
_comment_intermediary: names matching these are composite strings (two entities in one field) — kept whole, flagged for the intermediary detector, never merged
